<!--
Thank you for building AI-Native OS with us. Keep the whole OS feeling like one tool:
fill in the two sections below, then tick the checklist. The house-style CI checks
em-dashes only; the full voice rules live in docs/VOICE-GUIDE.md.
-->

## What this changes

One or two sentences. What does this add or fix, and which skill, flow, loop, agent, or doc does it touch?

## How verified

Where and how you tested it. Which platform (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, or a no-code paste), and what you actually ran. A passing read is not proof; say what you observed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the [skill scaffold](../skills/templates/skill-scaffold.md): frontmatter, the fixed body shape, the authoring checklist.
- [ ] Ships its own `references/` file with the real framework (not restated prose).
- [ ] British spelling throughout (colour, behaviour, optimise, organise, judgement).
- [ ] No em-dashes or en-dashes (number ranges excepted); commas, full stops, or colons instead.
- [ ] No banned words (see the list in [docs/VOICE-GUIDE.md](../docs/VOICE-GUIDE.md)).
- [ ] Dictionary cross-links resolve: every `## Dictionary` link points to a real entry.
- [ ] A copy-paste prompt is included for non-coders, with placeholders from the shared glossary.
- [ ] [ROADMAP.md](../ROADMAP.md) updated (item moved from "next" to "shipped", or a new row added).
- [ ] `license:` and `attribution:` frontmatter preserved.
